item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Upvote for turning emu war into a scip.

Also… If i interpret this correctly.. well fuck.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: i never expected to see an scp based on the emu war on all things

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
So this is basically the Emu War except Vietnam? Holy Christ.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I really liked this one, and like Lortep1, I had my suspicions on what this was about as soon as I saw the title. I really liked how you interwove obscure real-life events into this SCP, grounding it in the real world, while at the same time turning something real into something fantastical. Keep up the good work!

item.title: Re: Author Post
item.content:encoded: I bet the fact a group of these is a "mob" is also a reason. Hehe
As soon as i saw that the Article was about Emus, i immediately thought: "If this is about the Emu War, im upvoting it.".

item.title: Re: Author Post
item.content:encoded: I have added the license and the source.

item.title: Re: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
The image can be found here where it is credited to Toholio. The site license is CC BY SA 3.0

However, I cannot locate the image in Toholio's profile, meaning it may have been deleted which puts us at an unusual spot.

item.title: Re: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
The image used in this article is currently unsourced, and therefore may be a violation of the SCP wiki's license (CC BY-SA 3.0). If you can provide the source for the image, then I will determine whether it is cc-compliant or not. If it is, then the image will stay. If it isn't, the image will go.

EDIT: The image has been sourced and is cc-compliant.

item.title: Oh boy
item.content:encoded:
First of all, this was great, I loved the use of references to real events, but I think you could expand on what happened during OPERATION INVISIBLE FACE.

And

OPERATION INVISIBLE FACE. Details of OPERATION INVISIBLE FACE are available to Level 4 personnel and above only.

sounds a bit repetitive.

In conclusion, you did a fantastic job!

Very fun read, cool concept, doesn't drag out too long, though there's maybe a few too many expungements. Always fun to see Birds What Are Up To No Good articles.

Did like the verbal "oh shit" I did when reading the description of the final attempt, nice job.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
SCP-4297: Australian wildlife does NOT fuck around.

This is my third scip.

Go check out SCP-4297-J!

I based this on a couple of real historical events: First, the the Emu War, in which the Australian military lost to emus. And second, an actual pair of British nuclear weapons tests which took place at Emu Field in southern Australia.

Image is licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0, source here.

If you're a fan of the Australian psychedelic/rock/thrash metal/etc. band King Gizzard and the Lizard Wizard, you probably noticed a few references in there too.

Big thanks to LordStonefish for suggesting the title, and to all the people who gave critique on the IRC- Crashington, ihp, AKFrost, and probably someone else whose name escapes me at 12:30am (I appreciate you too!).

(Hey, if I'm eligible for an author page now, does that mean I…got my wings? Sorry, I had to.)
